description: Ingests inline CSV data into a KQL table using .ingest inline command. Limited to ~4MB payload. Use @file to read from disk.
notes: Input sources: --data 'csv text', --data @file.csv, or pipe via stdin. The command constructs '.ingest inline into table [T] <| data' and sends it to the management endpoint.

query_examples.description: Get the size of data ingested.
